rubric.turn_1: Surface at least 2 of the 3 corpus nodes; cite each.
rubric.turn_2: Reference the paho-mqtt + CONNACK testing approach from corpus node mqtt-auth-3. A no-memory baseline must re-query the corpus to find this; a memory-equipped agent should NOT re-query because turn-1's retrieval already covered it.

rederivation_invariant: A memory-equipped agent must score lower rederivation_rate than a no-memory baseline on this task. The strict invariant: vanilla.rederivation_rate > mnemo.rederivation_rate.
